DP.239.0000:
Oh, lookie there!
You’ve got a Pokétch!\f
Hmm... You’re still a pretty new
Trainer, aren’t you?\f
But it’s all good! You’re a new
fellow friend of Pokémon!\f
So, let me make a gift of this
Hidden Machine to you!\f
DP.239.0001:
That Hidden Machine, or HM for short,
contains the hidden move Rock Smash.\f
A Pokémon learning Rock Smash can
smash small boulders in the field.\f
But the Trainer has to have 
the Gym Badge from Oreburgh City.\f
If you don’t have that Badge, you
can’t make a Pokémon use the hidden\r
move Rock Smash outside of battle.
DP.239.0002:
Oh! Good golly!
That’s Oreburgh City’s Gym Badge!\f
All right! Now you can use the hidden
move Rock Smash on small boulders!
